app.title: FanPicks
app.name: FanPicks
app.tagline: Create groups, predict scores, climb the leaderboard.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check that the API is running.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load this page. Please try again.

awaitingApproval.title: Awaiting approval
awaitingApproval.intro: Your account is ready, but you don't have active access to a group yet.
awaitingApproval.noMemberships: You have no group requests. Sign up for a group or contact the administrator.

register.title: Create your account
register.name: Name
register.passwordWeak: The password must be at least 8 characters long and include at least one letter and one number.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including a letter and a number.
register.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.loadError: Could not load the dashboard. Please try again.
dashboard.deadlineWarning: ⚠️ The deadline to predict is about to close!
dashboard.noOpenRound: No open round at the moment. Check back later!

predictions.blockedDraft: This round is not open for predictions yet.
predictions.blockedLocked: The round is locked. Predictions are closed.
predictions.blockedScored: The round has already been scored.
predictions.blockedDeadline: The deadline to predict for this round has passed.
predictions.fillAll: Fill in the score for every match.

mirror.title: Predictions mirror
mirror.locked: The mirror is only available after the round is locked.

results.title: Results
results.notScored: This round hasn't been scored yet.

standings.title: Standings
standings.empty: The standings have not been calculated yet.
standings.name: Name

adminDash.title: Administration
adminDash.createSeasonSub: Create the season before the rounds

settings.allowParticipantsToViewOthersPredictions: Allow participants to view other predictions
When enabled, participants can see others' predictions while the round is open (live, before the lock). When disabled, only admins can, and only after the round closes.

predictionsMirror.title: Participants' predictions
predictionsMirror.notAllowed: You do not have permission to view other participants' predictions.
predictionsMirror.availableAfterLock: Other predictions will be available after the round closes.

predictionSubmission.participantsCanSubmit: Participants can submit predictions in the app
predictionSubmission.participantsCanSubmitHelp: Approved participants will be able to submit and edit their own predictions before the round closes.
predictionSubmission.adminOnlyHelp: Participants will not be able to submit predictions in the app. The administrator will enter them manually or via OCR.
predictionSubmission.adminOnlyNotice: In this season, predictions are entered by the administrator. You can still follow your rounds and results in the app.
predictionSubmission.disabledError: Participants cannot submit predictions in the app for this season. Predictions will be entered by the administrator.
predictionSubmission.disableWarning: There are already predictions submitted by participants. Disabling this option will not delete existing predictions, but it will prevent new submissions in the app.

adminSeasons.title: Seasons
adminSeasons.name: Name
adminSeasons.typeFixedHelp: The tournament type determines the available teams and rules.

roundForm.title: New round
roundForm.subtitle: Set the basics and search the period's matches.
roundForm.name: Name

fixtures.noneFound: No fixtures found for the selected period.
fixtures.endBeforeStart: End date must be greater than or equal to start date.
fixtures.leagueOneSingle: This round already has one League One match. To add another, provide a justification.
fixtures.manualHint: You can still add matches manually on the round screen.
fixtures.noneFoundManual: No fixtures found. Create the round and add matches manually.
fixtures.searchError: Couldn't search for fixtures right now. You can add the matches manually.
fixtures.createManual: Create round and add matches manually

roundDetail.title: Round detail
roundDetail.name: Name
roundDetail.needMatchesToPublish: Add at least one match before publishing.
roundDetail.lockHint: Locking closes prediction entry. After that, enter the results and calculate the score.
roundDetail.finalized: Round finalized! Results and points calculated.
roundDetail.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this round?
roundDetail.confirmLock: Locking closes prediction entry and freezes the matches for this round. Continue?
roundDetail.confirmFinalize: This will lock the round (if it isn't already) and calculate the final score. Continue?
roundDetail.confirmRecalculate: This will recalculate the round score from the current results. Continue?
roundDetail.confirmReopen: This reopens the round back to Locked so you can fix results. Scores stay until you calculate again. Continue?
roundDetail.copyFailed: Could not copy. Select the text and copy manually.

temporaryStandings.title: Temporary standings
temporaryStandings.notice: Temporary standings — points may change until the round is finished.
temporaryStandings.empty: No results yet to compute the temporary standings.

scout.title: Scout
scout.hint: Each participant's predictions grouped by scoreline, match by match. Copy and share in the group.
scout.empty: No predictions registered for this round yet.

adminMatches.title: Round matches
adminMatches.notEditable: This round does not allow editing matches.
adminMatches.leagueOneWarning: ⚠️ There is already a League One match. A justified manual multiplier is required.
adminMatches.sameTeam: Home and away cannot be the same team.

manual.title: Register predictions
manual.prefilledNote: Predictions loaded — saving will overwrite the existing ones.

ocr.title: Import predictions from image
ocr.subtitle: Upload a photo of the predictions table and let OCR fill in the scores.
ocr.dropHint: PNG, JPG or HEIC · up to 10 MB
ocr.tip: Sharp, well-framed photos without glare greatly improve recognition accuracy. You can review the scores before saving.

selectGroup.title: Select group
selectGroup.subtitle: Choose which group you want to enter.

group.noApprovedAccess: You do not have approved access to any group yet. Please wait for the group administrator approval.
group.noAccess: You do not have access to this group.

superAdmin.hint: Platform administrator: you can access every group.
superAdmin.selectGroupHint: As a platform administrator you can enter any group below.

createGroupType.england: Premier League, FA Cup, Championship and League One.
createGroupType.worldCup: Group stage, knockout rounds and classics between world champions.

temporaryStandingsNotice.title: Temporary standings
temporaryStandingsNotice.notice: Temporary standings — points may change until the round is finished.

flavioRule.worldCupNotice: Flavio Rule active: from the quarter-finals onward, the leader must submit predictions within the special deadline. If late, half of the round points will be lost.

predictionNotice.worldCupSignedPrints: Prediction screenshots must be signed and sent in the official Palpitão World Cup 2026 WhatsApp group.
